ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector the company operates in */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company belongs to */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the company is listed */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "listed_date" TEXT /* Date the company got listed */,
  "website" TEXT /* Company website URL */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the stock */,
  "percent_change" REAL /* Percentage change in stock price */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ttm_pe" REAL /* Trailing twelve months price-to-earnings ratio */,
  "price_to_book" REAL /* Price-to-book ratio */,
  "roe" REAL /* Return on equity */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stocks_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the financial record belongs to */,
  "net_profit" REAL /* Net profit of the company */,
  "net_sales" REAL /* Net sales of the company */,
  "debt_to_equity" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio of the company */,
  "current_ratio" REAL /* Current ratio of the company */,
  "interest_coverage_ratio" REAL /* Interest coverage ratio of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financials_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, portfolio manager, admin) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the portfolio was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the portfolio (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_stocks" (
  "portfolio_stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio stock */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the stock belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock in the portfolio */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_stocks_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the transaction belongs to */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock involved in the transaction */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the stock at the time of transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the transaction was made */,
  "fees" REAL /* Fees associated with the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_news_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "market_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data point */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the market data is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the market data */,
  "open" REAL /* Opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close" REAL /* Closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the stock traded on the given date */,
  "adj_close" REAL /* Adjusted closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_portfolio_performance" (
  "user_portfolio_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user portfolio performance record */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio the performance record is for */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "return" REAL /* Return of the portfolio on the given date */,
  "volatility" REAL /* Volatility of the portfolio on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_portfolio_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_portfolio_performance_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_screeners" (
  "stock_screener_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock screener */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the stock screener */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the stock screener */,
  "criteria" TEXT /* Criteria for the stock screener */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_screener_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_screeners_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
